## What and why

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and the full suite passes (`pytest tests`, C++ tests)
- [ ] If read/write behavior changed, the C++ core and both bindings stay
      consistent
- [ ] If the MEX changed, `matlab/test_mef3io.m` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (`docs/`, guides, README)
- [ ] CI is green
